html:
2026-0572
2026-06-11NRPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax MeasuresAppointment of Mariève Paradis of Dollard-des-Ormeaux, Québec, to be a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, on a part-time basis.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures
precis: Appointment of Mariève Paradis of Dollard-des-Ormeaux, Québec, to be a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, on a part-time basis.
